Dave Matthews & Tim Reynolds
Toyota Presents: The Oakdale Theatre     Wallingford, CT
 
Poster
Setlist
All media for this show (2)
Saturday
Total Song Time
2 hours and 22 minutes and 50 seconds
Avg Song Debut 08.20.2001
Setlist Changes
- You Are My Sanity and Kundalini Bonfire picked for Tim solos
- Little Thing added
- Grey Street cut, replaced with Halloween

First time Halloween has been played by Dave & Tim since 3.13.99.
